title: Koanophyllon gabbii

taxonomy: Koanophyllon gabbii is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is a species of flowering plant in the genus Koanophyllon. Its classification is an important aspect of understanding the plant's evolutionary history and relationships within the plant kingdom.
